response.original_title: ((Add~More~Cabins)) How do I add a extra room or cabin to my MSC Cruise? The Ultimate Guide
response.overview: To add another stateroom to an existing MSC cruise, you must call MSC Cruises directly at +1-866-[829]-1280 (US) or contact your travel agent, as adding rooms cannot be done via the app. Call MSC Directly: The most reliable method is to call MSC at +1-866-[829]-1280(US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK) to check real-time availability and link the new room to your existing reservation. To add a room to an existing MSC Cruises booking, you must call MSC directly at +1-866-[829]-1280 (US) (or your travel agent) as this cannot be done online. A new, +1-866-[829]-1280 (US) separate booking is required for the additional cabin, which can then be linked to your original, ensuring they are adjacent or connecting. The most reliable method is to call MSC at +1-866-[829]-1280 (US) or +44-[204]-586-5316(UK) to check real-time availability and link the new room to your existing reservation.
response.title: ((Add~More~Cabins)) How do I add a extra room or cabin to my MSC Cruise? The Ultimate Guide
